song: 26 - For You, For Me, For Evermore
comment: Published lyrics by Ira Gershwin. Verse (smoothly) + Refrain (not fast). Pipeline completely lost the verse opening 'Par-a-dise can-not re-fuse us, Nev-er such a hap-py' (no measures in pipeline data). Multiple note-loss gaps: m8 (lost 4 notes from 'All the shad-ows now will'), m22 (lost 'to be'), m34 (lost 'you're mine,'), m38-m39 (lost 'end-ing starts.'). Second ending m49-m50 also lost.

8.comment: Pipeline had 'All shad will' on 3n + 3r. Published: 'All the shad-ows now will lose us,'. Pipeline lost 4 notes (3r should be notes). Best fit for 3n: 'All the shad'. Rest of syllables lost.

10.comment: Pipeline had 'Luck y stars are ev ry' missing apostrophe. Published: 'Luck - y stars are ev - 'ry -'. 6n.

12.comment: Pipeline had 'As hap py' dropping 'a'. Published: 'As a hap - py'. 3n + 1r. Only 3 notes available.

18.comment: Pipeline had 'bound for' -- wrong word. Published: 'me, for' (from 'for me, for ev-er-more'). 2n.

19.comment: Pipeline had 'ev ~er more,' -- tilde is OCR garble. Published: 'ev - er - more,'. 3n.

20.comment: Pipeline had 'Its' missing apostrophe. Published: 'It's'. 2n + 1r, 1 lyric on held note is correct.

24.comment: Pipeline had 'It's' (1 lyric) on 2n + 1r. Published: 'It's'. Same pattern as m20. Correct.

42.comment: Pipeline had 'world will be a' on 4n + 1r. Published: 'world will be, With a'. Missing comma after 'be' and 'With' misread as continuation. 4 notes carry 4 syllables but 'a' should be 'With a' split differently.

44.comment: Pipeline had 'store For' on 2n. Published: 'store. For'. Missing period.

47.comment: Pipeline had 'ceremony' -- severe OCR garble. Published: 'more!' (1st ending). 1n.
